meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on project ideas. Learn how to engineer high-converting user onboarding to validate your SaaS fast using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: If you lack project ideas, stop hunting for 'the next big thing.' Instead, build a specialized onboarding flow that solves a high-friction business process. By focusing on the first five minutes of user experience, you create immediate value, validate market demand, and generate revenue before your core product is even finished.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a founder's graveyard. You are paralyzed by the search for a perfect, billion-dollar idea, while your competitors are already shipping modular solutions that solve one tiny, painful problem. The secret isn't a better idea; it's a better delivery mechanism that proves value in seconds.

By pivoting your focus from 'what to build' to 'how to onboard,' you shift your mindset from architect to revenue-generator. We will leverage Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code to execute the implementation, transforming your lack of direction into a high-converting, user-centric SaaS prototype.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the singular value delivery that turns a visitor into a user. Map out the path from signup to the first successful micro-outcome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user flow diagram for a B2B SaaS onboarding sequence that prioritizes a quick win within 60 seconds of login.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a sequence diagram for the onboarding flow focusing on the user's first micro-conversion.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding Engine
steps.description: Use Antigravity to build the backend infrastructure that tracks user state and progress through the onboarding funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust state-machine schema for a user onboarding funnel, including steps for data collection, tutorial completion, and activation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the onboarding state machine logic based on the provided schema.'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware UI
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject interactive prompts that adjust based on user input, removing friction from complex setups.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React component for a dynamic onboarding wizard that changes steps based on user persona selection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the dynamic wizard component using the provided Antigravity structure.'

steps.title: Integrate Analytics Hooks
steps.description: Embed telemetry to measure drop-off points. If users aren't finishing onboarding, you don't have a product problem; you have a flow problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an event-tracking middleware for the onboarding funnel to log completion rates at every step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add telemetry hooks to the onboarding flow and connect them to the logging service.'

steps.title: Deploy to Staging for Validation
steps.description: Push your onboarding flow to a live environment and force-test it with real users to observe where they get confused.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a deployment pipeline that deploys the current onboarding module to a Vercel staging environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy the current codebase to staging and provide the public access URL.'

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card during onboarding; ask for a specific business metric that your app helps solve.
Use 'Empty State' design to show users what the dashboard looks like when it's fully populated, not just 'No data found'.
If a user drops off, trigger a specialized email sequence that addresses the specific step where they stalled.
Keep your onboarding under 3 minutes; if it takes longer, you are building a tool, not a solution.
Always provide a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through a tutorial is the fastest way to lose high-intent leads.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, run 10 user interviews this week. If nobody engages with the 'Aha!' moment, discard the project and pivot the onboarding logic to a different niche immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum. Your next project is one user-centric flow away from profitability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
